---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Is it related to a frustration?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

Describe how this would be used in practice.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, examples, or references.
